New Gym opens on Sipat Road, Bilaspur / सिपाट रोड, बिलासपुर में नया जिम खुला
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 01:10:53
The new gym has been added to OpenStreetMap at its location on Sipat Road in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh. It provides fitness facilities for residents in the area.
New MarWARI Hotel and Lodge opens in Bilaspur / मारवाड़ी होटल एंड लॉज बिलासपुर में खुला
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
MarWARI Hotel and Lodge, located on Station Road, has started operations offering accommodation and dining facilities in Bilaspur. The new venue aims to cater to travelers and business guests in the area.
BREAKINGMarriott Courtyard opens new hotel in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में मैरियट कोर्टयार्ड का नया होटल खुला
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
Marriott Courtyard has inaugurated a new hotel at NH130A, Green Garden Colony, Bilaspur, offering accommodation and amenities.
New Hotel JEET CONTINENTAL Opens in Tikrapara, Bilaspur / टिकरापारा, बिलासपुर में नया होटल जीत कॉन्टिनेंटल खुला
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:21:55
JEET CONTINENTAL, a new hotel, opened at tikrapara in Bilaspur, offering accommodation and dining facilities. The opening boosts local hospitality and tourism in the region.
EDUCATION7
Rural students connected to modern tech, says CM Sway / ग्रामीण विद्यार्थियों को आधुनिक तकनीकों से जोड़ने की पहल, मुख्यमंत्री विष्णुदेव साय
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 13:06:21
Chief Minister Vishnu Deo Sway highlighted a new initiative linking rural students with future technologies to develop Chhattisgarh. The program aims to bridge the digital divide and prepare youth for modern careers. It marks a key step toward a technologically advanced state.
BREAKINGMaharishi Vidya Mandir accused of denying exams, TC; dept responds / महर्षि विद्या मंदिर पर परीक्षा व टीसी रोकने का आरोप, शिक्षा विभाग ने मांगा जवाब
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
The private school in Rajendra Nagar allegedly prevented students from taking annual exams and withheld transfer certificates. After a CM helpline complaint, the education department has sought an explanation from the school.
College opens outdoor fitness gym / कॉलेज में खुला आउटडोर फिटनेस जिम
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 04:40:12
GEC Bilaspur Road now hosts a new College Outdoor Fitness Gym, offering modern equipment for students and locals. The facility aims to boost health, sports, and community fitness activities.
Admission Notice: M.Sc. Digital Forensic & Info Sec 2026-27 / गुरु घासीदास विश्वविद्यालय में प्रवेश नोटिस
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya · Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya released an admission notice for the M.Sc. program in Digital Forensic and Information Security for the 2026-27 session. Candidates can apply as per the announced schedule and eligibility criteria.
Guru Ghasidas University LDC shortlist released / एलडीसी परीक्षा के लिए शॉर्टलिस्ट जारी
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
The university has published the list of candidates shortlisted for the Lower Division Clerk exam, along with those not shortlisted. Applicants can check their status on the official portal.
List of Shortlisted Candidates for Stenographer Test / स्टेनोग्राफर परीक्षा के लिए चयनित/अचयनित उम्मीदवारों की सूची
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya has released a list of candidates shortlisted and not shortlisted for the stenographer examination, skill, practical, and written tests.
BREAKINGUGV UDC Exam List Released / गुरु घासीदास विश्वविद्यालय ने यूडीसी परीक्षा के लिए शॉर्टलिस्ट जारी की
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:21:55
Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya released the list of shortlisted and not‑shortlisted candidates for the UDC exam, skill, practical and written tests. It includes names of selected and rejected applicants for the recruitment process.
EVENT1

G News Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 15:21:54
This entry marks an event scheduled for 15 July 2026 at 02:00 EVN. It may refer to a broadcast, meeting, or public activity.
GOVERNMENT15
BREAKINGTakhatpur watchman murder sparks protest, demands compensation and jobs / तखतपुर के चौकीदार की हत्या पर हंगामा, एक करोड़ मुआवजा और नौकरी की मांग
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 04:40:12
The brutal killing of a watchman in Takhatpur has ignited public unrest, with families demanding one crore rupees compensation and employment. Despite administrative efforts to mediate, protests persist.
Mineral dept seizes 6 tractors for illegal sand transport / सीएम हेल्पलाइन पर एक्शन, 6 ट्रैक्टर जब्त
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
Following a complaint on the CM helpline, the mineral department raided and seized six tractors transporting illegal sand and gravel. The action aims to curb illegal mining and protect resources.
BJP expands role of Syed Maqbool Ali in Durg division / संगठन में बढ़ा सैय्यद मकबूल अली का दायरा, दुर्ग संभाग की कमान में मिली अहम भूमिका
CG Wall · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 13:06:21
The Bharatiya Janata Party reshuffled its minority front, giving Syed Maqbool Ali a larger responsibility in the Durg division. This move is part of a broader organizational expansion aimed at strengthening party presence. Observers see it as a strategic effort to broaden outreach.
BREAKINGMunicipal Sub Engineer commits suicide in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में नगर निगम के सब इंजीनियर ने आत्महत्या की
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 15:21:54
Amar Singh Chauhan, a sub engineer with Bilaspur Municipal Corporation, was found dead in Civil Lines police station area. Authorities have launched an inquiry to determine the cause of his suicide.
BREAKINGChhattisgarh High Court withdraws pregnancy case order / छत्तीसगढ़ हाई कोर्ट ने गर्भावस्था मामले का आदेश वापस लिया
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
The court decided it had not yet reached a verdict on the pregnancy-related matter and thus withdrew its previous order. Police were informed about the development.
Bilaspur joins 20 green ATM projects, rice via ATM / बिलासपुर 20 ग्रीन एटीएम प्रोजेक्ट में शामिल, एटीएम से मिलेगा चावल
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
Food Controller Amrit Kujur announced Bilaspur is now part of 20 green ATM projects across India. This will enable rice distribution through ATMs, making the PDS more transparent, accessible and tech‑driven.
BREAKINGHigh Court rejects Raipur Municipal Corporation pension plea / हाई कोर्ट ने रायपुर नगर निगम की पेंशन याचिका खारिज की
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Mon, 13 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
The court dismissed the corporation's petition regarding a pension case, questioning why facts were not presented during the hearing. This sets a precedent for future pension disputes.
BREAKINGGovernment land on NH-49 registered in private name sparks panic in Janjgir / जांजगीर में एनएच-49 किनारे की शासकीय भूमि निजी नाम पर दर्ज, मचा हड़कंप
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Mon, 13 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
A large land scam in Janjgir involves government land along NH-49 being illegally registered under a private name, causing widespread alarm.
BREAKINGChhattisgarh Assembly thanks Centre for Naxalism eradication / छत्तीसगढ़ विधानसभा ने नक्सलवाद उन्मूलन के लिए केंद्र का आभार व्यक्त किया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
The Chhattisgarh Legislative Assembly passed a resolution thanking the central government for successfully eradicating Naxalism in the state. The move acknowledges coordinated security efforts and underscores the need for continued development in formerly affected areas.
BREAKINGAssembly uproar over fertiliser and seed shortages / छत्तीसगढ़ विधानसभा में उर्वरक और बीज की कमी पर हंगामा
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
The Chhattisgarh Assembly saw intense disruption as members protested against acute shortages of fertilisers and seeds affecting farmers. Legislators demanded immediate government action to ensure supply and price stability for agricultural inputs, highlighting the urgent need for policy intervention.
BREAKINGOBC reservation case hearing mis‑scheduled, HC to hold debate today / ओबीसी आरक्षण मामले में सुनवाई गलत तरीके से निर्धारित, हाईकोर्ट आज बहस करेगा
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
The High Court in Bilaspur discovered a clerical error that mistakenly scheduled a hearing for the OBC reservation case. The court clarified that the actual debate will take place today, ensuring proper legal proceedings.
BREAKINGCabinet clears Rs 10,800 cr proposals and Rs 1,587 cr guarantee for moong procurement / कैबिनेट ने 10,800 करोड़ के प्रस्ताव और 1,587 करोड़ की ब्याज मुक्त गारंटी को मंजूरी दी मूंग खरीद के लिए
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
The cabinet approved proposals worth Rs 10,800 crore and an interest‑free guarantee of Rs 1,587 crore for moong procurement. The move aims to support farmers and ensure timely purchase of the pulse. It reflects the government’s focus on agricultural welfare and price stability.
Block Project Manager lists under Bihan / बीहान के तहत ब्लॉक प्रोजेक्ट मैनेजर की सूचियाँ
District Administration Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
The Bilaspur District Administration has released merit, selection, and waiting lists for the Block Project Manager position under the Chhattisgarh State Rural Livelihood Mission (Bihan). Candidates can check their status on the official portal to know if they are selected or on the waiting list.
Yoga/Sports Instructors needed for PM SHRI schools / योग/खेल प्रशिक्षकों की आवश्यकता पीएम श्री योजना के तहत स्कूलों के लिए
District Administration Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
The District Administration Bilaspur has issued a notice inviting applications for Yoga and Sports instructors to serve in PM SHRI scheme schools until March 31, 2027. Interested candidates can apply with required qualifications.
Janata Congress announces Chhattisgarh 2.0 from Bilaspur / बिलासपुर से जनता कांग्रेस ने जनता कांग्रेस छत्तीसगढ़ 2.0 का ऐलान किया
G News Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 15:21:54
The Bilaspur‑based Janata Congress unveiled its new version, Janata Congress Chhattisgarh 2.0, aiming to revamp its political strategy. The announcement signals a fresh approach ahead of upcoming elections.
HEALTH10
Mega health camp in Hardi offers free health checks and specialist advice / हरदी में मेगा हेल्थ कैंप, ग्रामीणों ने नि:शुल्क स्वास्थ्य जांच एवं विशेषज्ञ परामर्श लिया
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
A mega health camp was organized in Hardi and nearby villages, providing free medical examinations and specialist consultations. Villagers took advantage of the services, improving community health awareness.
BREAKINGSnake bite cases rise at Bilaspur Simhs / सावधान! बिलासपुर सिम्स में रोज सर्पदंश के 4-5 मामले
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
Bilaspur Simhs reports 4-5 snake bite patients daily, with 12 scorpion cases in July. Authorities warn residents to take precautions against venomous creatures.
BREAKINGMega health camp in Hardi, free check-ups for hundreds / हरदी में मेगा हेल्थ कैंप, सैकड़ों ग्रामीणों ने नि:शुल्क जांच
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
JRC Associates organized a mega health camp in Hardi village, offering free medical examinations to hundreds of villagers. The event provided essential healthcare services to the rural community.
BREAKINGWorkers and families protest JLN Hospital privatisation / जेएनएल अस्पताल भिलाई के निजीकरण के खिलाफ कर्मचारी और परिवार एकजुट
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
Workers and their families have united to oppose the privatisation of JLN Hospital in Bhilai. The protest highlights concerns over public healthcare access and job security, seeking to halt the government's privatisation plan.
BREAKINGSeven deadly bacteria found in migratory birds, warns ICMR / प्रवासी पक्षियों में घातक बैक्टीरिया पाए गए, ICMR ने चेताया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
ICMR study reveals seven life‑threatening bacteria in migratory birds, raising health concerns across India. The findings urge stricter monitoring of bird migration routes and public health preparedness. Authorities are advised to issue alerts for poultry farms and wildlife handlers.
Narayani Hospital inaugurated on NH130A, Bilaspur / नारायणी अस्पताल एनएच130ए पर खोला गया
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
Narayani Hospital, a new healthcare facility, has opened its doors in green garden colony, Bilaspur. It provides medical services to the local community.
BREAKINGMulti Super Specialty Hospital opens in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में मल्टी सुपर स्पेशियलिटी हॉस्पिटल का उद्घाटन
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
The new Multi Super Specialty Hospital on Seepat Road, Bilaspur, provides advanced medical services to the region.
New Clinic Opens in Bilaspur / वंदना अस्पताल बिलासपुर में खोला गया
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Vandana Hospital, located on NH130A in Green Garden Colony, has been listed as a new healthcare facility in Bilaspur. It will provide local residents with medical services and improve health‑resource mapping in the area.
New Clinic Opens in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में नया क्लिनिक खुला
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 20:51:13
A new clinic/hospital named Bilaspur Hospital has been opened at Mangla Road, Green Garden Colony in Bilaspur. The facility is listed on OpenStreetMap and serves the local community.
New Shri Childrens Hospital opened in Bilaspur / श्री बाल चिकित्सालय का उद्घाटन बिलासपुर में
OpenStreetMap · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 22:47:29
The Shri Childrens Hospital has been listed on OpenStreetMap as a new medical facility located on Sipat Road in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh. It will provide pediatric healthcare services to the local community.

The Environmental Protection Board and GST department inspected Amaron Royal Automotive in Bilaspur’s Trade Bihar area, checking compliance with environmental and tax rules. The visit signals tighter regulatory oversight for local industries.
Instagram/@g_news_bilaspur Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Tata Nexon crashes on under‑construction bridge near Bilaspur / बिलासपुर-उरगा मार्ग पर निर्माणाधीन पुल से टाटा नेक्सन गिरा
A Tata Nexon following Google Maps crashed on an under‑construction bridge on the Bilaspur‑Urega road, falling about 30 feet. The accident highlights the danger of using maps on incomplete roads, prompting safety warnings.
Instagram/@g_news_bilaspur Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Youth faces electric danger after climbing goods train at Pendra / पेंड्रा रेलवे स्टेशन पर मालगाड़ी पर चढ़े युवक को हाई वोल्टेज लाइन से खतरा
A young man climbed a goods train at Pendra railway station, exposing himself to a deadly high‑voltage overhead line. Railway officials rescued him and warned against risky behaviour, stressing the need for safety awareness.
Instagram/@decode_bilaspur Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Guard killed at juvenile home in Bilaspur / बाल सुधार गृह में चौकीदार नरेंद्र खांडे की हत्या
Narendra Khande, a guard at a juvenile observation home, was murdered late Sunday. The killing has shocked authorities and raised concerns about security in juvenile facilities, prompting a police investigation and manhunt.
Instagram/@decode_bilaspur Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Ambala petrol pump dispute leads to fresh case / अम्बा पेट्रोल पंप पर फिर मामला
Bilaspur's Amba petrol pump saw a fresh legal case after a recent fight between parties. The incident adds to ongoing tensions at the fuel station, and authorities are investigating the cause.
Instagram/@decode_bilaspur Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Sensational murder of nursing student in Bhilai / भिलाई में नर्सिंग छात्रा की सनसनीखेज हत्या
A nursing student was found murdered in Bhilai, shocking the community. Police are searching for the culprit, and investigations are underway to uncover the motive.

Recent news about Bilaspur Chopati highlights ongoing infrastructure improvements. The area is being upgraded to enhance connectivity and public amenities, with residents expecting better access and services.

Tricolor flag disrespected in Bilaspur due to poor lighting / बिलासपुर में रोशनी के अभाव में तिरंगा का अपमान
During a night event in Bilaspur, the national flag was displayed without adequate illumination, causing public outrage. Authorities have been urged to ensure proper flag etiquette, sparking discussions on respecting national symbols.
Instagram/@bilaspurcrime Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Panic at Bilaspur bus stand after civic vandalism / बिलासपुर बस स्टैंड पर निगम की तोड़फोड़ से हड़कंप
A sudden act of vandalism by a civic body at Bilaspur bus stand caused widespread panic among commuters. The damage disrupted services and raised safety concerns, prompting a police investigation to identify those responsible.

🌹 || जय माँ नैना देवी || 🌹 आज के दिव्य दर्शन | दिनांक: [14.07.2026] ​"ऊंचे पहाड़
🌹 || जय माँ नैना देवी || 🌹 आज के दिव्य दर्शन | दिनांक: [14.07.2026] ​"ऊंचे पहाड़ों वाली, भक्तों के दुखों को हरने वाली, माँ नैना देवी के पावन चरणों में कोटि-कोटि प्रणाम।" ​माँ के सुंदर स्वरूप के दर्शन कीजिए और अपने दिन की मंगलमयी शुरुआत कीजिए। करुणामयी माँ आपकी हर जायज मनोकामना पूरी करें। ​👉 कमेंट में 'जय माता दी' लिखें और इस दिव्य दर्शन को अपनों के साथ भी शेयर करें। 🙏❤️
Instagram/@bilaspur_today_news Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
स्वारघाट में कार से 1.96 ग्राम चिट्टा बरामद, तीन आरोपी गिरफ्तार
स्वारघाट में कार से 1.96 ग्राम चिट्टा बरामद, तीन आरोपी गिरफ्तार
Instagram/@lokswar.in Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Sim's negligence leads to miscarriage from wrong injection / सिम्स की लापरवाही से गर्भपात, गलत इंजेक्शन
A woman suffered a miscarriage after receiving a wrong injection at Sim's hospital, highlighting serious medical negligence. The incident has sparked outrage over patient safety and accountability in public health facilities.
Instagram/@lokswar.in Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Fair monitoring curbs crimes, 5000 steel rods seized / मेले में निगरानी से वारदात पर लगाम, 5 हजार कड़े जब्त
Police monitoring at a local fair successfully curbed criminal activities, leading to seizure of 5,000 illegal steel rods. The operation demonstrates effective law enforcement and public safety measures.
Instagram/@lokswar.in Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Elderly inmate dies in Bilaspur jail after bathroom slip / बिलासपुर जेल में बुजुर्ग कैदी की मौत, बाथरूम में फिसलने से
An elderly prisoner serving a life sentence died in Bilaspur jail after slipping in the bathroom, raising concerns over inmate welfare and safety protocols. Authorities are investigating the circumstances.
Instagram/@lokswar.in Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 19:00:05
Police station deal vs press note absconding, diesel theft, ASI suspended / थाने में 'डील' और प्रेस नोट में 'फरार'!डीजल चोरी कांड पर हड़कंप, ASI निलंबित
A diesel theft case has caused a scandal after police records claimed the suspect was absconding, while a station-level deal suggested otherwise, leading to ASI suspension. The discrepancy highlights corruption and accountability issues.
NEWS15
बिलासपुर मल्हार में चोरी: इंजीनियर के सूने मकान का ताला तोड़कर चोरों ने पार किए जेवर और नगदी
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
<img src="https://img.naidunia.com/naidunia/ndnimg/15072026/15_07_2026-cchori26engg.jpg" />चौहा गांव में इंजीनियर के सूने मकान से अज्ञात चोरों ने 15 हजार रुपये और सोने-चांदी के जेवर चोरी कर लिए। वारदात सीसीटीवी कैमरे में कैद हो गई है, जिसमें चोर का चेहरा साफ दिख रहा है। पुलिस मामले की जांच कर रही है
बिलासपुर में काल बनी रफ्तार: कार की भीषण टक्कर से 10 फीट हवा में उछला स्कूटी सवार, मौके पर ही मौत
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
<img src="https://img.naidunia.com/naidunia/ndnimg/15072026/15_07_2026-cctvdughtna.jpg" />बिलासपुर-रायपुर राष्ट्रीय राजमार्ग पर हिर्री माइंस के पास सोमवार को एक तेज रफ्तार कार की टक्कर से स्कूटी सवार 52 वर्षीय ग्रामीण देवेंद्र शर्मा की मौत हो गई।
Army Major wins world's highest ultra marathon at Umling La / लद्दाख के उमींग ला पर विश्व की सबसे ऊँची अल्ट्रा मैराथन में जीत
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
An Indian Army Major completed the world's highest ultra marathon at Umling La in Ladakh, setting a new record at 19,300 feet. The feat highlights the region's challenging terrain and the growing popularity of ultra-running.
BREAKINGIndia launches UNSC campaign, prioritising maritime order: Jaishankar / भारत ने संयुक्त राष्ट्र सुरक्षा परिषद में अभियान शुरू किया, समुद्री τά序 को प्राथमिकता दी
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
India has launched a UNSC campaign, with External Affairs Minister Jaishankar emphasizing a rule‑based maritime order. The initiative underscores India's commitment to global maritime security and cooperation.
BREAKINGUS attacks Iran, Tehran retaliates across Middle East / अमेरिका ने ईरान पर हमला किया, तेहरान ने मध्य पूर्व में प्रतिशोध लिया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
The US attacked Iran, prompting Tehran to retaliate across the Middle East. The escalating exchange raises concerns over regional stability and potential broader conflict.
BREAKINGTrump urges Gulf allies to fund US security / ट्रम्प ने खाड़ी सहयोगियों से अमेरिकी सुरक्षा के लिए भुगतान करने का आग्रह किया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
Former President Trump called on Gulf allies to fund US security costs, urging financial contributions. The demand reflects a shift in burden‑sharing among strategic partners.

The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15

BREAKINGFish thieves kill crocodile with electric trap in Pachara pond / मछली चोरों ने पचरा तालाब में करंट लगाकर मारा विशालकाय मगरमच्छ
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 04:40:12
Poachers set an electric current in Pachara pond to catch fish, inadvertently killing a large crocodile. The incident underscores illegal fishing dangers and wildlife protection concerns.
BREAKING13 juveniles escape from Bal Sampaark Grih, police launch search / बाल संप्रेक्षण गृह से 13 किशोर फरार, पुलिस ने खोज अभियान शुरू किया
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 04:40:12
Thirteen minors broke out of the Bal Sampaark Grih in Ambikapur, prompting a massive police search operation. Authorities are working swiftly to recapture the fugitives and ensure public safety.
BREAKINGPolice seize 1.20 crore ganja, 3 cars, arrest 2 smugglers / पुलिस ने 1 करोड़ 20 लाख की गांजा और 3 कारें जब्त कर 2 तस्करों को गिरफ्तार किया
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
During Operation Aaghat in Sariguja range, Jashpur police seized ganja worth ₹1.20 crore and three vehicles. Two smugglers were arrested, marking a major crackdown on drug trafficking.
Youth arrested for brandishing knife and spreading panic / दहशत फैलाने निकला युवक गिरफ्तार, चाकू के साथ
CG Wall · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
A young man was arrested in Bilaspur after brandishing a sharp knife in public, causing panic among residents. Police seized the weapon and are investigating the incident.
BREAKINGDeadly trailer crash kills father, injures family / तेज रफ्तार ट्रेलर का कहर, पिता की मौत
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
A high-speed trailer collided with a scooter in Pendra, killing the father and seriously injuring his wife and child. Authorities have launched an investigation into the accident.
BREAKINGFinance firm employees charged after pregnant woman mistreatment / बिलासपुर में गर्भवती महिला से दुर्व्यवहार मामले में तीन कर्मचारी गिरफ्तार
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
Three finance company employees have been booked for allegedly mistreating a pregnant woman in Bilaspur, sparking public outrage. Police are investigating the incident and seeking further details.
Mobile snatchers bold in Bilaspur, journalist's phone stolen / बिलासपुर में झपटमारों ने पत्रकार का मोबाइल लूट लिया
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
Mobile snatchings are rising in Bilaspur as thieves stole a journalist's phone and fled. The incident underscores growing lawlessness and safety concerns among professionals.
BREAKING55 kg ganja smuggler from Odisha caught by GRP / 55 किलो गांजा तस्कर ओडिशा से गिरफ्तार
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
The GRP arrested another accused in a 55 kg ganja smuggling case, apprehending a fugitive from Odisha. This reinforces recent efforts to curb drug trafficking in the region.
BREAKINGHighway kicking leads to robbery, four arrested / हाईवे पर लात मारकर गिराया, फिर लूटे हजारों रुपये, चार गिरफ्तार
CG Wall · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 13:06:21
Four suspects were caught after they kicked a passerby off a highway and stole thousands of rupees. The incident occurred late at night on the Ratangarh-Kota road near Bilaspur. Police recovered the stolen cash and launched a crackdown on night‑time robbery.
BREAKINGLand dispute turns violent, deadly clash over house construction / जमीन विवाद ने लिया हिंसक रूप, घर निर्माण को लेकर खूनी संघर्ष
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
A land dispute escalated into a violent clash in Doudki village, resulting in a deadly fight over house construction. The incident highlights ongoing property conflicts in the area.
BREAKINGTraffic Police deploys 120 volunteers in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में 120 चेतना यातायात मितान उतारे गए
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
The Bilaspur traffic police launched 120 'Chetna Traffic Mitran' volunteers to boost road safety and involve the public. This initiative aims to turn road safety into a mass movement, improving traffic management and awareness.
Wall dispute turns violent, one arrested for attempted murder / दीवार विवाद में हत्या के प्रयास के आरोप में एक गिरफ्तार, दो फरार
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
A property wall dispute in Bilaspur escalated into a deadly clash, resulting in an arrest for attempted murder and two suspects on the run. The incident highlights the seriousness of neighborhood property conflicts.
Burglary in Chakarbatha, lakhs in jewelry and cash stolen / चकरभाठा में चोरी, लाखों के जेवर और नकदी चोरी
Lokswar · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
Thieves targeted an empty house in Chakarbatha, stealing jewelry and cash worth several lakhs. The incident highlights vulnerability of unoccupied homes and prompts police vigilance.
BREAKINGTorsa Police Nabs 10 Fugitive Warrants in One Day / तोरवा पुलिस ने एक दिन में 12 वारंट तामील करते हुए 10 फरार अपराधियों को पकड़ा
CG Wall · Published: Tue, 14 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:21:55
Torsa police arrested ten wanted fugitives evading law, executing twelve warrants in a single day. The crackdown underscores local police efforts to curb crime and bring offenders to justice.
BREAKINGSecurity guard killed, four minors escape from Bilaspur Juvenile Home / बिलासपुर बाल संप्रेक्षण गृह में सुरक्षा गार्ड की हत्या, चार नाबालिग फरार
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Mon, 13 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
A security guard was murdered while on duty at the Bilaspur Juvenile Home, and four minor inmates have escaped, prompting a police investigation.
Crocodile carcass discovered in Khuntaghat Dam / खुंटाघाट बांध में मगरमच्छ का शव मिला
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 11:22:39
A dead crocodile was found in Khuntaghat Dam, prompting concerns about wildlife safety and water management. Authorities have launched an investigation to determine the cause and prevent future incidents, highlighting the need for ecosystem monitoring.
BREAKINGEOW arrests ICICI Manager in Rs 23Cr fake gold loan scam / EOW ने ICICI मैनेजर को 23 करोड़ के नकली सोने के लोन घोटाले में गिरफ्तार किया
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
The Economic Offences Wing arrested an ICICI Bank manager and a gold valuer in a Rs 23‑crore fake gold loan scam. The fraud involved falsifying loan applications and inflating gold collateral values. The case highlights vulnerabilities in bank loan verification processes.
Mahindra Finance staff accused of mistreating pregnant woman / महिंद्रा फाइनेंस कंपनी के कर्मचारियों पर गर्भवती महिला से दुर्व्यवहार का आरोप

Three Mahindra Finance employees are alleged to have harassed a pregnant woman in Bilaspur. The case has sparked public outrage and prompted a police investigation.
BREAKINGASI suspended after video shows diesel thieves' release / डीजल चोरों को छोड़ना पड़ा महंगा, वीडियो वायरल होते ही ASI निलंबित
G News Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
An ASI was suspended after a video surfaced showing him releasing diesel thieves, drawing public anger over corruption. The incident prompts calls for stricter action against fuel theft.
BREAKINGMurder case registered, four accused absconding in Bilaspur juvenile home / बाल सुधार गृह हत्याकांड में हत्या का केस दर्ज, चार आरोपी फरार
G News Bilaspur · Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
A murder case has been filed following the brutal killing in Bilaspur’s juvenile home, with four suspects still at large. Police are conducting a manhunt and seeking public help to capture the accused.

BREAKING10 arrested for leaving JCB bucket causing Kargi Road train derailment / करगीरोड रेल हादसे में जेसीबी बकेट छोड़ने के आरोप में 10 गिरफ्तार
Lokswar · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
The derailment of a goods train at Kargi Road railway station was caused by a discarded JCB bucket on the track. Ten individuals have been arrested for their role in leaving the equipment, prompting safety reviews.

BREAKINGSub‑Engineer commits suicide in Nagar Nigam colony, body found hanging / बिलासपुर में निगम कालोनी में सब इंजीनियर की खुदकुशी, फांसी पर लटकी लाश मिली, सुसाइड नोट बरामद
Nai Dunia Bilaspur · Published: Wed, 15 Ju | Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
A sub‑engineer working with the municipal corporation was found hanged in his colony, with a suicide note recovered. The incident has shocked the local community and raised concerns about workplace stress.
Ward No 14 residents suffer administrative apathy / वार्ड 14 के निवासियों को प्रशासनिक उदासीनता का सामना करना पड़ रहा है

Residents of Ward 14 in Bilaspur complain of neglect by local authorities, citing lack of basic services and unresponsive officials. The issue highlights broader problems of civic governance and citizen grievances.

The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 09:50:09
Members of VHP and Bajrang Dal organized a large-scale protest at a private school in Bilaspur, resulting in minor vandalism. The demonstration reflects ongoing tensions over educational policies and cultural issues.
BREAKINGFamily opposition leads to youth suicide, girl critical / परिवार के विरोध ने युवती और युवक को आत्महत्या के लिए मजबूर किया, एक की मौत
The Hitavada · Scraped: 2026-07-15 07:49:15
A young couple facing family opposition committed suicide, resulting in the death of the youth and critical condition of the girl. The incident highlights the severe impact of forced marriages and familial pressure. Authorities are investigating the case and offering counseling services.

A speeding car caused a major accident on the Bilaspur‑Raipur national highway, resulting in damage and injuries. Police are investigating the cause of the crash.

Four notorious robbers caught red-handed after loot / चार शातिर लुटेरे लूट की वारदात के बाद गिरफ्तार
Police apprehended four armed robbers who had carried out a recent looting incident. Authorities are questioning them about possible accomplices.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 15:21:54
New ration distribution rules implemented in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में राशन वितरण के नए नियम लागू
The municipal authority has rolled out updated guidelines for ration distribution in Bilaspur, effective immediately. The changes aim to improve transparency and reduce misuse of subsidies.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-15 | Scraped: 2026-07-15 15:21:54
Bilaspur High Court rejects state government's appeal / बिलासपुर हाईकोर्ट ने राज्य सरकार की अपील खारिज की
The Bilaspur High Court dismissed the state government's appeal, marking a legal setback for the administration. This decision highlights judicial oversight in state matters.

ASI suspended for releasing diesel thieves / डीजल चोरों को छोड़ने पर एएसआई निलंबित
An ASI was suspended after allegedly releasing diesel thieves. The incident raises concerns about law enforcement integrity in Bilaspur.

Car falls 30 ft from under‑construction bridge in Bilaspur / बिलासपुर में निर्माणाधीन पुल से 30 फीट नीचे गिरी कार
A car plunged 30 feet from an under‑construction bridge in Bilaspur, causing damage. Authorities are investigating the cause of the accident.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 15:23:48
Deadly clash with sticks over house construction / घर निर्माण को लेकर भिड़े दो पक्ष डंडों से जानलेवा हमला
Two groups engaged in a violent clash using sticks over a house construction dispute, resulting in serious injuries. The incident underscores local tensions regarding property rights.

Grand News Bilaspur Evening Final News 14.07.2026 / ग्रैंड न्यूज़ बिलासपुर इवनिंग फाइनल न्यूज़ 14.07.2026
The evening final news bulletin from Grand News Bilaspur on 14 July 2026 delivers the day’s key updates, community highlights, and official announcements for residents.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
Eviction threat looms over 50-year families in Bilaspur Ghatku / बिलासपुर घुटकू में 50 साल से बसे परिवारों पर बेदखली का खतरा
Authorities plan to evict families settled in Ghatku for five decades, threatening long‑time residents with loss of homes. The move has sparked protests and legal challenges over housing rights.
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:11:46
FIR against 4 in Bilaspur juvenile home murder, post-mortem refused / बिलासपुर बाल संप्रेक्षण गृह हत्याकांड में 4 पर FIR, पोस्टमार्टम से इनकार
Four people have been named in an FIR over a murder at Bilaspur’s juvenile home. The victims’ families have refused post‑mortem, demanding a thorough investigation and justice.

विधानसभा परिसर में &#39;एक पेड़ मां के नाम&#39; अभियान, मुख्यमंत्री विष्णुदेव साय
Bilaspur Grand News Published: 2026-07-14 | Scraped: 2026-07-14 17:21:55
Million-Dollar Theft from Empty House in Chakrabatha, Bilaspur / बिलासपुर के चकरभाठा में सूने मकान से लाखों की चोरी
An empty house in Chakrabatha, Bilaspur, was robbed, resulting in millions of rupees stolen. Police have launched an investigation to identify the culprits and recover the stolen items.
